code:
fn validate_age(_ age: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if age < 0
    Err("negative")
  else if age > 150
    Err("too-large")
  else
    Ok(age)
  end
end

fn show(_ age: Int) -> Unit
  match validate_age(age)
  when Ok(a)
    print("ok=#{a}")
  when Err(m)
    print("err=#{m}")
  end
end

show(-1)
show(25)
show(200)
